content.body: Meeting cancelled due to lack of quorum

If you've not seen it, there is an `import defer` update on the agenda: https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1pH5SCZRJaN-HFeOn0WZ9KD64vvunPZdxhyYuMMHZLC8/edit

The first item is a bug that we need consensus to fix; the other two are discussion about alternative behaviours that have been suggested.
